expected_effect: Create dead-code-finder skill to detect orphaned files and unused exports in JS codebases, breaking 9-cycle stagnation with a genuinely novel innovation
rationale: 9 consecutive failures all used banned gene_auto_53538cc4 with optimize-category strategy on innovate intent. All 3 catalyst suggestions (code-stats, todo-manager, test-runner) already exist. Creating a novel static analysis skill that fills a real gap in the toolset.

preconditions: no existing dead-code analysis skill in workspace
strategy: Identify gap in existing skill coverage
Design static analysis tool for JS require/import graph
Create index.js with file globbing, require extraction, export extraction, dependency graph building
Create SKILL.md with YAML frontmatter and usage docs
Test against real directory to verify output

summary: Created dead-code-finder skill: scans JS codebases for orphaned files and unused exports via static require/import graph analysis, outputs structured report with A-D health grading
